title: Successful Login with Email and Password Redirects to Dashboard
description: Verifies that a registered user can authenticate using a valid email and password combination, sees a loading state during submission, and is redirected to the dashboard with an active authenticated session.
expected_result: User successfully authenticates with email and password, a loading state is shown during submission, the user is redirected to /dashboard, and an authenticated session is established as evidenced by the presence of the user avatar/name in the UI.

test_steps.expected: Login page is displayed at /login URL

test_steps.action: Verify the email field label is visible
test_steps.expected: Label 'Email' is visible on the page

test_steps.action: Enter valid email address into the email field
Enter valid password into the password field
Click the Submit / Sign In button
test_steps.expected: A loading indicator becomes visible immediately after click

test_steps.action: Wait for redirect to the dashboard after successful authentication
test_steps.expected: User is redirected to /dashboard and dashboard content is visible

test_steps.action: Verify authenticated session is established (user avatar or name visible)
test_steps.expected: Authenticated user indicator (avatar or display name) is visible in the navigation
